content.en:
Arrow's main department.

Ye Tian's transfer of the Eagle Department did not hide it from them.

They knew very well that Ye Tian should have found a brand new ownerless space-time bubble and transferred the Eagle Department to that space-time bubble.

They were also not interested in letting Ye Tian fuse that space-time bubble with the endless space-time domain, after all, one more space-time bubble was not much, and one less space-time bubble was a lot.

That space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure was already being conceived with very rapid efficiency, and finding a way to surround and kill the Duowei Ancient Demon and snatching that space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure was the most important thing, and there was no need to spend his mind on Ye Tian.

......

After Ye Tian dealt with the affairs of the Eagle Department, he gradually understood the reason why many Ultimate Ancient Demons fused with space-time bubbles to form the Endless Space-Time Domain.

In order to impact the space-time level ultimate ancient demon realm.

Moreover, the Endless Time and Space Domain has also given birth to a space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure, and there is not much time left before it is conceived.

Wow!

Ye Tian came to the core area of the Endless Time and Space Domain, and here he saw the space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure that was in the process of being conceived.

Just by feeling the breath of this space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure in the middle of the gestation, Ye Tian felt its power.

Any treasure he had ever seen, even the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space, was less than one percent of it.

I have to say that Ye Tiandu has a full interest in this space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure, and he can't wait to occupy it.

He is not a person of this era, and he is so interested in the space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure of this era, it is conceivable that those Ultimate Ancient Demons will definitely work hard for this space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure.

Now.

Ye Tian could sense that the will of the Ultimate Ancient Demon was locked here, and whoever dared to destroy this unformed space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure would offend all the Ultimate Ancient Demons.

Ye Tian just watched for a while and left here.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian often communicated with one Ultimate Ancient Demon after another, and also learned a lot of secret knowledge from the mouths of these Ultimate Ancient Demons.

this day.

When Ye Tian was talking to the Ancient Demon of Stygian Elegance, he learned an amazing secret.

In the end, it will be doomed!

Any Ultimate Ancient Demon reveals a fear of the ultimate doom.

Ye Tian deduced for a moment, only to feel dead silence and despair, and he also had a terrible awe in his heart for this so-called final catastrophe.

He even suspected that the end of the era of the Ultimate Ancient Demon might be the final catastrophe.

But there is another possibility, that is, the end of the Ultimate Ancient Demon Era, only a final tribulation, not the final tribulation, and the final tribulation is still after his era.

If this is the case, even if he returns to his own time, he will have to face the ultimate catastrophe.

Therefore, Ye Tian was naturally looking forward to the first situation.

"It would be nice if I could break through to the space-time level ultimate ancient demon realm in this era~. "

But Ye Tian knew very well that he couldn't do this.

This era is not real, it is just a projection of the era, and being able to accommodate the ultimate ancient demon realm is already the limit.

And.

If he hadn't guessed, there shouldn't have been any Ultimate Ancient Demon in this era who had broken through to the space-time level Ultimate Ancient Demon, not even that Dovi Ancient Demon.

......

Time passes slowly.

It wasn't too long before that space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure was conceived.

Finally, on this day, this space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure is about to be born.

At this time, the Ultimate Ancient Demons gathered in the core area of the Endless Time and Space Domain, and they were all waiting for each other to be conceived by the Ultimate Treasure of the Extreme Dao of Time and Space.

A replica body of Ye Tian also came here, and he was also paying attention.

However, he also sensed that something was wrong with the atmosphere, as if there was a strong killing intent permeating.

Dovigumo also sensed that something was wrong, but she didn't care, because she was completely confident in her own strength.

This is the self-confidence of the number one on the Ultimate Ancient Demon List!

After another while, this space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure was about to be bred.

"Do it!"

The top ultimate ancient demons such as the Aromu Ancient Demon drank loudly.

One by one, the Ultimate Treasures of the Extreme Dao were sacrificed by these Ultimate Ancient Demons, and they all suppressed the Dovi Ancient Demons.

"You're looking for death!"

Dovigu Demon was furious, and the breath of her whole body exploded, and the terrifying Extreme Path Ultimate Realm turned into a round ball to protect her.

Thundered!!!!

The slaughter began, and the slaughter of these ultimate ancient demons caused the entire Endless Time and Space Domain to shake.

If it were an ordinary space-time bubble, I am afraid that it would have to be shattered at this time.

Ye Tian didn't participate in it, he only hid from a distance to watch the battle, and there was more than one ultimate ancient demon watching the battle like him.

Suddenly.

Many of the defenses on the body of a top-notch Ultimate Ancient Demon were pierced, and the palm of the Dovi Ancient Demon shattered its body, and countless particles were annihilated.

A top-notch Ultimate Ancient Demon Fall.

And the Dovigu Demon was also knocked away, and his body was injured.

The fall of a top-notch Ultimate Ancient Demon did not make other top-level Ultimate Ancient Demons jealous, after all, at this point, it was impossible for them to retreat, otherwise they would be killed by Dovi Ancient Demons one by one.

Therefore, apart from falling, they only have the only way to kill the Dovi Ancient Demon.

Time passed, and every second seemed like a long time had passed.

Gradually, the injuries of the (Wang Liaozhao) Duowei Ancient Demon worsened, but the injuries of the other Ultimate Ancient Demons were more serious. []

After a while, another Ultimate Ancient Demon was killed.

But Dovigumo's injuries already made her not have much advantage, but was at a disadvantage, and there was some panic in her heart.

"'~Everyone, you help me deal with this group of guys, and then capture the ultimate treasure of the space-time level Extreme Dao, I will share it with you!"

Dovigu's Demon Path.

This is an extremely tempting condition, but the other Ultimate Ancient Demons are still watching the show and are not participating in it.

After all, as long as the Dovi Ancient Demon did not die, they had no hope, and if the Dovi Ancient Demon died, they also had the hope of snatching the space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure.

Besides, if they had helped the Dovigus, and in the end the Dovigus were defeated, and they would be finished.

So, onlookers are the best choice.
